title: Adding Numbers to Solve Problems
description: Students will learn how to add numbers and explain their reasoning by connecting it to everyday situations.

prompts.input: How would you explain why adding is important in real life?
hints: Think about situations where you need to combine things.
Consider how you use addition when shopping or sharing.

assessment.learningObjective: Say why adding is important in real life.
successCriteria: Says that adding means putting things together.
Gives a real-life example of when you need to add.
Explains in own words why adding helps in daily life.
misconceptions: Thinks adding is only for math class and not used outside.
Believes adding is the same as counting.
Doesn't realize that adding can help with sharing or buying things.

subject: Math
